sentence: I was so ill that I didn’t go to school. (too)
answer: I was too ill to go to school.
explanation: Cấu trúc đổi từ 'so ... that' sang 'too ... to'. 'so ill that I didn’t go to school' tương đương với 'too ill to go to school'.

sentence: I’m much better at this job than Gordo is. (than)
answer: Gordon is much worse than I am at this job.
explanation: Đổi chiều phép so sánh: 'I’m much better ... than Gordo' tương đương với 'Gordon is much worse than I am ...'. Lưu ý đề in là 'Gordo' nhưng dòng điền chỗ trống trong sách là 'Gordon is ...'.

sentence: There were such a lot of customers that I didn’t get a break all day. (many)
answer: There were so many customers that I didn’t get a break all day.
explanation: Đổi từ 'such a lot of customers' sang 'so many customers'. Vì 'customers' là danh từ đếm được số nhiều nên dùng 'many'.

sentence: I’ve never done a job more difficult than this. (most)
answer: This is the most difficult job I’ve ever done.
explanation: Đổi từ so sánh hơn sang so sánh hơn nhất: 'more difficult than this' thành 'the most difficult'.

sentence: The hospital was so big that I couldn’t find my cousin’s bed. (such)
answer: It was such a big hospital I couldn’t find my cousin’s bed.
explanation: Đổi từ 'so + adjective' sang 'such + a/an + adjective + noun'. Trên bảng giáo viên viết không có từ 'that', nên đáp án được giữ đúng theo ảnh bảng.

sentence: Tim caught a cold on holiday, but I was lucky and I didn’t. (than)
answer: I was luckier than Tim and didn’t catch a cold on holiday.
explanation: Dùng so sánh hơn của 'lucky' là 'luckier than'. Câu mới diễn đạt rằng tôi may mắn hơn Tim vì tôi không bị cảm.

sentence: You became ill because the fish wasn’t cooked properly. (have)
instruction: You wouldn’t ........................................................ if the fish had been cooked properly.
answer: You wouldn’t have become ill if the fish had been cooked properly.
explanation: Đây là câu điều kiện loại 3: 'wouldn’t have + past participle'. Diễn tả một kết quả trong quá khứ đã không xảy ra nếu điều kiện quá khứ khác đi.

sentence: You didn’t get better because you didn’t take your pills. (have)
answer: You would have got better if you had taken your pills.
explanation: Câu điều kiện loại 3: 'would have + past participle'. Trên bảng là 'would have got better', nên mình giữ đúng theo ảnh.

sentence: The price of bread has increased again. (in)
answer: There has been another increase in the price of bread.
explanation: Đổi động từ 'increase' thành danh từ 'increase'. Cấu trúc mới là 'There has been another increase in ...'.

sentence: What were you wearing when it started snowing? (on)
answer: What did you have on when it started snowing?
explanation: Cụm 'have on' có nghĩa tương đương với 'wear' trong ngữ cảnh đang mặc gì.

sentence: This painting is like that one. (similar)
answer: This painting is similar to that one.
explanation: Cấu trúc tương đương: 'be like' có thể đổi thành 'be similar to'.

sentence: This wall keeps the animals in. (prevents)
answer: This wall prevents the animals from getting out.
explanation: Cấu trúc: prevent sb from doing sth = ngăn ai làm gì.

sentence: Snakes don’t frighten Carol. (afraid)
answer: Carol isn’t afraid of snakes.
explanation: frighten → be afraid of.

sentence: You didn’t write the final paragraph of your composition. (left)
answer: You left out the final paragraph of your composition.
explanation: leave out = bỏ sót.

sentence: Would you like to help produce a school magazine? (involved)
answer: Would you like to get involved in producing a school magazine?
explanation: get involved in + V-ing = tham gia vào.

sentence: I didn’t know that. (aware)
answer: I wasn’t aware of that.
explanation: be aware of = biết về.

sentence: I don’t think you should go swimming so soon after lunch. (against)
answer: I would advise against swimming so soon after lunch.
explanation: advise against + V-ing = khuyên không nên.

sentence: ‘Alex, hurry up or we’ll be late!’ (on)
answer: ‘Alex, come on or we’ll be late!’
explanation: come on = nhanh lên.

sentence: Why don’t you throw that old furniture away? (rid)
answer: Why don’t you get rid of that old furniture?
explanation: get rid of = vứt bỏ.

sentence: What you said really surprised me. (by)
answer: I was really surprised by what you said.
explanation: be surprised by + clause.

sentence: I can’t hear you, so can you talk more loudly, please? (up)
answer: I can’t hear you, so can you speak up, please?
explanation: speak up = nói to hơn.

sentence: I don’t want to play computer games anymore. (tired)
answer: I’m tired of playing computer games.
explanation: be tired of + V-ing = chán làm gì.

sentence: I haven’t got any money left. (run)
answer: I have run out of money.
explanation: run out of = hết.

sentence: That tree might fall down. (danger)
answer: That tree is in danger of falling down.
explanation: in danger of + V-ing.

sentence: Who thought of that solution? (came)
answer: Who came up with that solution?
explanation: come up with = nghĩ ra.
